findings.title: Potential PII Handling Risk
findings.description: Privacy risk keywords detected in documentation indicate potential issues with PII handling, which may violate data minimization principles.
assumptions: The documentation may not fully comply with data minimization principles.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Review data handling practices to ensure compliance with data minimization.

metadata.mitigation: Review data handling practices to ensure compliance with data minimization.

findings.title: Critical Push Notification Delivery Failure on Android 14
findings.description: The failure of push notifications on Android 14 devices poses a critical risk to user engagement and retention, requiring immediate resolution.
assumptions: The issue affects a significant portion of users.

evidence.excerpt: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices.

recommendations: Prioritize fixing the push notification delivery issue on Android 14.

metadata.mitigation: Prioritize fixing the push notification delivery issue on Android 14.

findings.title: High Pricing Sensitivity Risk
findings.description: Pricing concerns have been flagged across multiple sources, indicating potential vulnerability to competitive pricing strategies.
assumptions: The current pricing strategy may not be sustainable.

evidence.excerpt: Pricing concerns have been flagged across multiple sources.

recommendations: Reassess pricing strategy to ensure competitiveness.

metadata.mitigation: Reassess pricing strategy to ensure competitiveness.

findings.title: Accessibility Challenges for Screen Reader Users
findings.description: Users have reported accessibility challenges, particularly for those using screen readers and colorblind individuals, indicating a need for improved design.
assumptions: The current design does not fully support accessibility standards.

evidence.excerpt: Several users have reported accessibility challenges.

recommendations: Enhance the design of the notification center to address accessibility challenges.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance the design of the notification center to address accessibility challenges.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk with Data Collection Practices
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicate potential issues with data collection practices that may not align with GDPR and CCPA requirements.
assumptions: Data collection practices may not fully comply with legal requirements.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 2 source(s).

recommendations: Conduct a compliance review of data collection practices.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a compliance review of data collection practices.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 2 compliance, 1 privacy, 1 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 1 warnings).
